Executive Summary\n\nThis report analyzes error patterns from the options-pipeline and IBKR MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration over a 30-day period. The analysis reveals **distinctly different failure modes** between the two systems:\n\n- **Options Pipeline**: 311+ total errors, primarily application-level (ZeroDivisionError in volatility calculations, API 404 errors)\n- **IBKR MCP**: 2 pod evictions due to infrastructure issues (disk space), with zero application errors in the running pod\n\n**Key Finding**: The failures are **isolated to specific integration points** rather than systemic. The options pipeline experiences recurring calculation errors, while IBKR MCP faces infrastructure resource constraints.\n\n---\n\n## Methodology and Data Sources\n\n### Data Collection\n- **Options Pipeline Logs**: iad-options cluster, namespace `options`\n  - Analyzed pods: `options-aggregator`, `options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-jlzqd`, `options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f`, `queue-reconciler`, `queue-api`\n  - Time range: 720 hours (30 days)\n  - Error filtering: `grep -iE \"error|exception|fail|warn|critical\"`\n\n- **IBKR MCP Logs**: ardenone-cluster, namespace `ibkr-mcp`\n  - Analyzed pods: `ibkr-mcp-server-7c97cbcdb-fbq4f` (running), `ibkr-mcp-server-7d78d47dbb-898mv` (evicted), `ibkr-mcp-server-7dd7c9c9bc-6cn57` (evicted)\n  - Time range: 720 hours (30 days)\n  - Pod state analysis via `kubectl describe pod`\n\n### Limitations\n- Logs limited to container output; no access to structured log aggregation (e.g., VictoriaLogs, Elasticsearch)\n- Temporal analysis constrained by pod restart events and log retention\n- No access to IBKR MCP server-level request/response logs\n\n---\n\n## Options Pipeline Error Analysis\n\n### Total Error Count: 311+ errors\n\n### Error Type Breakdown\n\n#### 1. **ZeroDivisionError** (226+ errors)\n**Location**: `options-greeks` pods  \n**Frequency**: High (34 errors in one pod, 192 in another over 30 days)  \n**Temporal Pattern**: Consistent throughout operating hours (sampled timestamps show ~10-15 minute intervals)  \n\n**Root Cause**: Invalid input parameters to volatility calculation in `py_vollib_vectorized` library:\n```python\nFile \"/usr/local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/py_vollib_vectorized/implied_volatility.py\", line 77, in vectorized_implied_volatility\n    sigma_calc = implied_volatility_from_a_transformed_rational_guess(undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag)\nZeroDivisionError: division by zero\n```\n\n**Likely Trigger**: Time to expiration (`t`) or another parameter is zero/invalid in the options data being processed.\n\n#### 2. **Cloudflare API 404 Errors** (85 errors)\n**Location**: `options-aggregator` pod  \n**Frequency**: Clustered on single day (2026-07-23)  \n**Temporal Pattern**: Single day event (25 errors on 2026-07-23)  \n\n**Error Pattern**:\n```\n2026-07-23 23:38:24 | ERROR | API request failed: GET https://api.cloudflare.com/.../deployments/86efb2b1 - 404 Client Error: Not Found\n```\n\n**Root Cause**: Attempting to verify a Cloudflare Pages deployment that no longer exists or has an invalid ID. The deployment verification logic retries with 10-second intervals, leading to repeated 404s until timeout (120s).\n\n#### 3. **Queue/Reconciler Deprecation Warnings** (Minimal impact)\n**Location**: `queue-reconciler` pod  \n**Frequency**: Low (warnings only, no errors)  \n\n**Pattern**: `DeprecationWarning: datetime.datetime.utcnow() is deprecated`  \n**Impact**: Low - indicates code modernization needed but no functional failures.\n\n---\n\n## IBKR MCP Error Analysis\n\n### Total Application Errors: 0\n**Infrastructure Failures: 2 pod evictions**\n\n### Error Type Breakdown\n\n#### 1. **Pod Eviction - Ephemeral Storage Exhaustion** (2 pods evicted)\n**Location**: `ibkr-mcp-server-7d78d47dbb-898mv`, `ibkr-mcp-server-7dd7c9c9bc-6cn57`  \n**Frequency**: 2 events over 30 days  \n**Age at eviction**: 79 days and 40 days respectively  \n\n**Root Cause**: Node ran out of ephemeral storage:\n```\nStatus: Failed\nReason: Evicted\nMessage: The node was low on resource: ephemeral-storage. \nThreshold quantity: 1631311281, available: 3663392Ki\n```\n\n**Exit Code**: 137 (SIGKILL - forceful termination by kubelet)\n\n**Container Resource Usage at Eviction**:\n- `mcp-server`: 4560Ki (first pod), 92Ki (second pod)\n- `ibeam`: 126492Ki (first pod), 4468Ki (second pod)\n- `totp-server`: 1856Ki (first), 1856Ki (second)\n\n#### 2. **Running Pod Health** (Zero errors)\n**Location**: `ibkr-mcp-server-7c97cbcdb-fbq4f` (running for 9 days)  \n**Application Health**: Excellent  \n**Response Times**: Consistent ~100-120ms for health checks  \n\n**Sample Logs**:\n```\n[http] GET /ibkr/health -> 200 (119ms)\n[http] GET /ibkr/health -> 200 (94ms)\n[http] GET /ibkr/health -> 200 (111ms)\n```\n\n---\n\n## Comparative Analysis\n\n### Error Pattern Comparison\n\n| Aspect | Options Pipeline | IBKR MCP |\n|--------|------------------|----------|\n| **Error Count** | 311+ application errors | 0 application errors |\n| **Primary Failure Mode** | Calculation logic errors | Infrastructure resource exhaustion |\n| **Temporal Distribution** | Consistent (daily) | Episodic (pod evictions) |\n| **Impact on Service** | Partial (specific pods affected) | Complete (pod eviction) |\n| **Recovery Mechanism** | Automatic (process continues) | Manual/automatic (respawn) |\n\n### Root Cause Categories\n\n#### Options Pipeline (Systemic Issues)\n1. **Data Quality Problem**: ZeroDivisionError suggests invalid/malformed options data being processed without validation\n2. **External Dependency Issue**: Cloudflare API integration lacks proper error handling for non-existent deployments\n3. **Code Modernization Needed**: Deprecation warnings indicate technical debt\n\n#### IBKR MCP (Infrastructure Issue)\n1. **Resource Management**: Disk space not properly provisioned or monitored\n2. **Log Retention**: Ephemeral storage consumption suggests logs or temporary files not cleaned up\n3. **Observability Gap**: No warnings before eviction; should alert before resource exhaustion\n\n### Temporal Correlation Analysis\n\n**No temporal correlation found** between options-pipeline errors and IBKR MCP failures:\n- Options-greeks errors: Consistent throughout operating hours (2026-07-24)\n- Options-aggregator errors: Clustered on single day (2026-07-23)\n- IBKR MCP evictions: 79 days ago and 40 days ago (historical, not recent)\n\n---\n\n## Recommendations\n\n### Immediate Actions (High Priority)\n\n#### 1. Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options-Greeks\n**Priority**: Critical  \n**Impact**: Eliminates 226+ errors (73% of total)  \n\n**Action**: Add input validation before volatility calculation:\n```python\n# Before calling py_vollib_vectorized.implied_volatility.vectorized_implied_volatility\nif t <= 0 or F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n    logger.warning(f\"Invalid parameters for IV calculation: t={t}, F={F}, K={K}\")\n    continue  # Skip this record or use default IV\n```\n\n**Testing**: Verify with historical data that triggered the errors.\n\n#### 2. Improve Cloudflare API Error Handling\n**Priority**: High  \n**Impact**: Eliminates 85 errors (27% of total)  \n\n**Action**: \n- Add deployment existence check before verification loop\n- Implement exponential backoff instead of fixed 10s intervals\n- Stop retrying after N consecutive 404s (deployment likely deleted)\n\n```python\n# Pseudo-code\nmax_retries = 3\nretry_count = 0\nwhile retry_count < max_retries:\n    try:\n        deployment = check_deployment_exists(deployment_id)\n        if not deployment:\n            logger.warning(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found, skipping verification\")\n            break\n    except HTTPError as e:\n        if e.response.status_code == 404:\n            retry_count += 1\n            time.sleep(2 ** retry_count)  # Exponential backoff\n        else:\n            raise\n```\n\n#### 3. Resolve IBKR MCP Disk Space Issue\n**Priority**: Medium  \n**Impact**: Prevents future pod evictions  \n\n**Actions**:\n1. **Immediate**: Check node disk usage and clear space if needed:\n   ```bash\n   kubectl --server=http://traefik-ardenone-cluster:8001 get nodes -o wide\n   df -h # on affected nodes\n   ```\n\n2. **Long-term**: \n   - Add ephemeral storage requests/limits to IBKR MCP pod spec\n   - Implement log rotation/retention policy in containers\n   - Add Kubernetes resource monitoring/alerting for disk usage\n\n   ```yaml\n   resources:\n     requests:\n       ephemeral-storage: \"2Gi\"\n     limits:\n       ephemeral-storage: \"5Gi\"\n   ```\n\n### Medium-Term Improvements\n\n#### 4. Enhance Observability\n**Actions**:\n- Deploy structured logging (JSON format) to both services\n- Set up log aggregation (VictoriaLogs per existing config)\n- Create dashboards for error rate tracking\n- Add Prometheus metrics for error counts\n\n#### 5. Pod Lifecycle Issues\n175\t\n176\t**Technical Details:**\n177\t- Multi-container pod (4 containers: ibeam, totp-server, mcp-server, screenshot-cleanup)\n178\t- Failed pods unable to recover from Error/Unknown states\n179\t- No logs available from failed containers\n180\t\n181\t**Suspected Root Causes:**\n182\t1. **Dependency Chain Failure:** One container failure affects entire pod\n183\t2. **Resource Constraints:** Memory/CPU limits exceeded during startup\n184\t3. **Authentication Issues:** IBKR gateway authentication failures\n185\t4. **Network Connectivity:** TWS/Gateway connection problems\n186\t\n187\t---\n188\t\n189\t## Recommendations\n190\t\n191\t### Immediate Actions (Priority 1)\n192\t\n193\t#### For Options Pipeline:\n194\t1. **Add Zero-Division Guards**\n195\t   ```python\n196\t   if divisor == 0:\n197\t       logger.warning(f\"Skipping zero-division for symbol={symbol}, date={date}\")\n198\t       continue\n199\t   ```\n200\t\n201\t2. **Implement Data Quality Pre-checks**\n202\t   - July 24, 2026 (30 days)\n\n---\n\n## Executive Summary\n\nThis report presents a comprehensive comparative analysis of failure patterns between the internal options pipeline (running on `iad-options` cluster) and the IBKR MCP server (running on `ardenone-cluster`) over a 30-day period.\n\n### Key Findings:\n1. **Internal Options Pipeline** exhibits significantly higher failure rates with **403 total restarts** across critical pods\n2. **IBKR MCP Server** shows superior stability with **0 restarts** on the healthy pod over 9 days\n3. **Primary Failure Pattern** in options pipeline is `ZeroDivisionError` occurring during historical data processing\n4. **Shared Challenge**: Both systems struggle with pod lifecycle management (ContainerStatusUnknown states)\n5. **Impact**: Options pipeline failures affect daily operations; IBKR MCP failures appear contained\n\n---\n\n## System Overview\n\n### Internal Options Pipeline (`iad-options` cluster)\n**Purpose:** Historical options data processing, greeks calculation, queue management\n\n**Deployed Components:**\n- `options-aggregator` - Data cleanup (1 pod, 0 restarts)\n- `queue-api` - Queue API service (1 pod, 0 restarts)\n- `queue-reconciler` - Queue reconciliation (1 pod, 156 restarts) ⚠️\n\n### IBKR MCP Server (`ardenone-cluster`)\n**Purpose:** Interactive Brokers Model Context Protocol server for trading data access\n\n**Deployed Components:**\n- `ibkr-mcp-server` - Main MCP server (3 pods, 1 healthy, 2 failed)\n  - Healthy pod: 9 days uptime, 0 restarts ✅\n  - Failed pods: 79d and 40d old, in Error/CrashLoopBackOff states\n\n---\n\n## Failure Pattern Analysis\n\n### Internal Options Pipeline - Top 5 Failure Patterns\n\n#### 1. **ZeroDivisionError** (🔴 CRITICAL)\n- **Frequency:** ~24 occurrences per pod daily\n- **Component:** `options-greeks` pods\n- **Root Cause:** Division by zero during working_price calculation\n- **Error Pattern:**\n  ```\n  ERROR __main__ - Unexpected error\n  ZeroDivisionError: division by zero\n  ```\n- **Impact:** High - causes pod restarts every ~45-60 seconds\n- **Timeline:** Continuous throughout the 30-day period\n\n#### 2. **High Restart Counts** (🔴 CRITICAL)\n- **Frequency:** 149 restarts (pod-24p6f), 98 restarts (pod-jlzqd), 156 restarts (queue-reconciler)\n- **Component:** `options-greeks`, `queue-reconciler`\n- **Pattern:** Automated restart loops without recovery\n- **Impact:** Severe - affects data processing reliability\n\n#### 3. **ContainerStatusUnknown** (🟡 MEDIUM)\n- **Frequency:** 1 occurrence (pod-8db6c)\n- **Component:** `options-greeks` \n- **Pattern:** Pod enters unknown state, requires manual intervention\n- **Impact:** Medium - reduces processing capacity\n\n#### 4. **Queue Reconciliation Failures** (🟡 MEDIUM)\n- **Frequency:** 156 restarts over 26 days (~6 per day)\n- **Component:** `queue-reconciler`\n- **Pattern:** Periodic restarts every ~22-23 minutes\n- **Impact:** Medium - affects queue processing\n\n#### 5. **Data Processing Anomalies** (🟢 LOW)\n- **Frequency:** Occasional\n- **Component:** `options-greeks`\n- **Pattern:** Specific data files triggering errors\n- **Impact:** Low - individual file failures don't stop overall processing\n\n### IBKR MCP Server - Top 5 Failure Patterns\n\n#### 1. **ContainerStatusUnknown** (🟡 MEDIUM)\n- **Frequency:** 1 occurrence (pod-6cn57, 4 restarts)\n- **Component:** `ibkr-mcp-server`\n- **Pattern:** Multi-container pod with partial failures\n- **Impact:** Medium - reduces service availability\n\n#### 2. **Pod Error State** (🟡 MEDIUM)  \n- **Frequency:** 1 occurrence (pod-898mv, 1 restart)\n- **Component:** `ibkr-mcp-server`\n- **Pattern:** Pod enters Error state and doesn't recover\n- **Impact:** Medium - pod-24p6f)\n73\t- Causes immediate pod termination and restart\n74\t- Affects data processing reliability\n75\t\n76\t#### 2. **Cloudflare API 404 Errors** (288+ errors) 🟡 HIGH\n77\t**Location**: Actions (High Priority)\n262\t\n263\t#### 1. Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options-Greeks 🔴 CRITICAL\n264\t**Priority**: CRITICAL  \n265\t**Impact**: Eliminates 127+ errors (28% of total)  \n266\t**Restart Prevention**: Would reduce 247+ pod restarts\n267\t\n268\t**Action**: Add input validation before volatility calculation:\n269\t```python\n270\t# Before calling py_vollib_vectorized.implied_volatility.vectorized_implied_volatility\n271\tif t <= 0 or F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n272\t    logger.warning(f\"Invalid parameters for IV calculation: t={t}, F={F}, K={K}\")\n273\t    continue  # Skip this record or use default IV\n274\t```\n275\t\n276\t**Testing**: Verify with historical data that triggered the errors.\n277\t\n278\t#### 2. Improve Cloudflare API Error Handling 🟡 HIGH  \n279\t**Priority**: HIGH  \n280\t**Impact**: Eliminates 288 errors (63% of total)\n281\t\n282\t**Action**: \n283\t- Add deployment existence check before verification loop\n284\t- Implement exponential backoff instead of fixed 10s intervals\n285\t- Stop retrying after N consecutive 404s (deployment likely deleted)\n286\t\n287\t```python\n288\tmax_retries = 3\n289\tretry_count = 0\n290\twhile retry_count < max_retries:\n291\t    try:\n292\t        deployment = check_deployment_exists(deployment_id)\n293\t        if not deployment:\n294\t            logger.warning(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found, skipping verification\")\n295\t            break\n296\t    except HTTPError as e:\n297\t        if e.response.status_code == 404:\n298\t            retry_count += 1\n299\t            time.sleep(2 ** retry_count)  # Exponential backoff\n300\t        else:\n301\t            raise\n302\t```\n303\t\n304\t#### 3. Clean Up Failed IBKR MCP Pods 🟢 MEDIUM\n305\t**Priority**: MEDIUM  \n306\t**Impact**: Resource cleanup, operational hygiene\n307\t\n308\t**Action**: Remove historical failed pods:\n309\t```bash\n310\tkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7d78d47dbb-898mv -n ibkr-mcp\n311\tkubectl delete pod ibkr-mcp-server-7dd7c9c9bc-6cn57 -n ibkr-mcp\n312\t```\n313\t\n314\t### Medium-Term Improvements\n315\t\n316\t#### 4. Add Input Validation Framework\n317\t- Implement schema validation for options data processing\n318\t- Add data quality metrics and monitoring\n319\t- Create validation layer before expensive calculations\n320\t\n321\t#### 5. Enhance Observability\n322\t- Deploy structured logging (JSON format) to both services\n323\t- Set up Prometheus metrics for error tracking  \n324\t- Create dashboards for error rate monitoring\n325\t- Add alerting for high restart frequencies\n326\t\n327\t#### 6. Implement Circuit Breakers\n328\t- Add circuit breaker pattern for external API calls (Cloudflare)\n329\t- Prevent cascade failures from external dependencies\n330\t- Implement retry with exponential backoff\n331\t\n332\t### Long-Term Architecture\n333\t\n334\t#### 7. Dead Letter Queue Pattern\n335\t- Route failed records to DLQ for manual inspection\n336\t- Implement partial success reporting\n337\t- Add batch-level error recovery\n338\t\n339\t#### 8. Resource Management\n340\t- Add ephemeral storage requests/limits to pod specs\n341\t- Implement log rotation/retention policies\n342\t- Add Kubernetes resource monitoring/alerting\n343\t\n344\t---\n345\t\n346\t## Conclusion\n347\t\n348\tThe analysis reveals **completely different failure patterns** between the two systems with **no shared error types or temporal correlation**:\n349\t\n350\t### Options Pipeline Assessment: 🔴 NEEDS IMMEDIATE ATTENTION\n351\t- **Problem**: Application-level errors causing 455+ failures over 30 days\n352\t- **Root Causes**: Calculation bugs (ZeroDivisionError) + External API issues (Cloudflare 404s)\n353\t- **Impact**: High - affects daily operations and data processing reliability\n354\t- **Priority**: CRITICAL - requires immediate code fixes\n355\t\n356\t### IBKR MCP Assessment: 🟢 STABLE WITH INFRASTRUCTURE ISSUES  \n357\t- **Problem**: Infrastructure resource management (historical pod evictions)\n358\t- **Application Health**: Perfect - 0 application errors\n359\t- **Impact**: Low - operational hygiene issue only\n360\t- **Priority**: LOW - code is stable, infrastructure cleanup needed\n361\t\n362\t### Key Takeaways:\n363\t1. **No shared failure modes** between the systems\n364\t2. **No temporal correlation** - failures are independent  \n365\t3. **Different priority levels** - Pipeline needs immediate code fixes; MCP needs infrastructure cleanup\n366\t4. **IBKR MCP application is extremely stable** - zero calculation or API errors\n367\t5. **Options pipeline needs defensive programming** - input validation and error handling\n368\t\n369\t### Priority Focus:\n370\tAddress the **ZeroDivisionError** in options-greeks first (127 errors, 247+ restarts), as it has the highest operational impact and occurs daily. options-pipeline errors against IBKR MCP server errors\n\n---\n\n## Executive Summary\n\nThis report presents a comprehensive comparative analysis of error patterns between the **options-pipeline** (running on `iad-options` cluster) and the **IBKR MCP server** (running on `ardenone-cluster`) over a 30-day period.\n\n### Key Findings:\n1. **Options Pipeline** exhibits significantly higher failure rates with **455+ application errors** across multiple pods\n2. **IBKR MCP Server** shows superior application stability with **0 application errors** in the healthy pod\n3. **Primary Failure Pattern** in options pipeline is split between:\n   - **ZeroDivisionError** during volatility calculations (127+ errors)\n   - **Cloudflare API 404 errors** during deployment verification (288+ errors)\n4. **IBKR MCP failures are infrastructure-only** (2 pod evictions), with zero application-level errors\n5. **No temporal correlation** found between pipeline and MCP failures\n6. **Root causes are completely different** - calculation bugs vs infrastructure resource management\n\n---\n\n## Methodology and Data Sources\n\n### Data Collection\n- **Options Pipeline Logs**: `iad-options` cluster, namespace `options`\n  - Analyzed pods: `options-aggregator`, `options-greeks` (multiple instances), `queue-reconciler`\n  - Time range: 720 hours (30 days) using `--since=720h`\n  - Error filtering: `grep -iE \"error|exception|fail|zero|traceback\"`\n  - Total logs analyzed: ~4,000+ lines\n\n- **IBKR MCP Logs**: `ardenone-cluster`, namespace `ibkr-mcp`\n  - Analyzed pods: `ibkr-mcp-server-7c97cbcdb-fbq4f` (healthy), failed pods (historical analysis)\n  - Time range: 720 hours (30 days)\n  - Pod state analysis via `kubectl describe pod` for failed pods\n  - Container logs: `--all-containers=true` for multi-container analysis\n\n### Analysis Limitations\n- Logs limited to container output; no access to structured log aggregation\n- Temporal analysis constrained by pod restart events and log retention policies  \n- No access to IBKR MCP server-level request/response logs beyond container output\n- Analysis based on available log data without instrumentation or tracing\n\n---\n\n## Options Pipeline Error Analysis\n\n### Total Error Count: **455+ application errors**\n\n### Error Type Breakdown\n\n#### 1. **ZeroDivisionError** (127+ errors) 🔴 CRITICAL\n**Location**: `options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-jlzqd`, `options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f`  \n**Frequency**: 34 errors in pod-jlzqd, 93 errors in pod-24p6f  \n**Temporal Pattern**: Consistent throughout operating hours (~10-15 minute intervals)\n\n**Root Cause**: Invalid input parameters to volatility calculation in `py_vollib_vectorized` library:\n```python\nFile \"/usr/local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/py_vollib_vectorized/implied_volatility.py\", \nline 77, in vectorized_implied_volatility\n    sigma_calc = implied_volatility_from_a_transformed_rational_guess(\n        undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag)\nZeroDivisionError: division by zero\n```\n\n**Likely Trigger**: Time to expiration (`t`) or another calculation parameter is zero/invalid in the options data being processed.\n\n**Impact**: \n- High restart frequency (98 restarts in pod-jlzqd, 149 in pod-24p6f)\n- Causes immediate pod termination and restart\n- Affects data processing reliability\n\n#### 2. **Cloudflare API 404 Errors** (288+ errors) 🟡 HIGH\n**Location**: `options-aggregator-f5ffb54fc-gkj59` pod  \n**Frequency**: 288 404 errors (out of 363 total aggregator errors)  \n**Temporal Pattern**: Clustered on single day (2026-07-23)\n\n**Error Pattern**:\n```\n2026-07-23 23:39:34 | ERROR | app.cloudflare_pages_api:verify_deployment_success:308 \n- Failed to verify deployment: 404 Client Error: Not Found for url: \nhttps://api.cloudflare.com/.../deployments/86efb2b1\n```\n\n**Root Cause**: Attempting to verify a Cloudflare Pages deployment that no longer exists or has an invalid ID. The deployment verification logic retries with 10-second intervals, leading to repeated 404s until timeout (120s).\n\n**Impact**:\n- External API integration failures\n- Resource waste from repeated failed API calls\n- Deployment verification pipeline failures\n\n#### 3. **Pod Lifecycle Issues** (3 failed pods) 🟡 MEDIUM\n**Location**: `options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-8db6c` (Failed), 2 other pods with high restarts  \n**Frequency**: 1 failed pod, 2 pods with 98+ restarts  \n**Age**: ~26 days old (from 2026-06-28)\n\n**Pattern**: Pod state management issues leading to failures and excessive restarts\n\n---\n\n## IBKR MCP Error Analysis\n\n### Total Application Errors: **0** ✅\n**Infrastructure Failures: 2 pod evictions**\n\n### Error Type Breakdown\n\n#### 1. **Pod Eviction - Dead Letter Queue Pattern\n- Route failed records to DLQ for manual inspection\n- Implement partial success reporting\n- Add batch-level error recovery\n\n#### 8.
